_comment: Expected output for verify-external.sh. Update on first verified run; PENDING_FIRST_VERIFICATION values are placeholders.
_notes: static-curl is a musl-static aarch64 build. F5 should report `musl`; F1 should NOT apply fortify suppression because musl lacks _chk variants. Concrete banned-function list is PENDING_FIRST_VERIFICATION since the curl source tree avoids many classic banned APIs but musl's internal helpers may still surface them via static link.
